title: *.evidence.json -- narrative document citation sidecar v0.1
description: Maps [E#] tags in a narrative document (screening_report.md, draft_report_v*.md, rebuttal_points.md) to their full citations. See harness-guardrails P1. Generated entirely by the document-assembly tool from an agent's per-field {content, evidence_references} -- no agent ever hand-writes a tag number or edits this file directly, which is what prevents a tag and its citation from drifting out of sync.

document_path.description: The .md file this sidecar belongs to, e.g. outputs/CASE_003/draft_report_v1.md

tag.description: Matches the inline [E#] tag in the document, assigned sequentially by the document-assembly tool.
